category_sources: Official GitHub README describes extracting URLs from a text file and selecting one via a menu.
source_facts.description says it is a URL extractor/launcher.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading and README identify the project as urlview.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best current project documentation surface found.
Official repository includes urlview.man as command documentation.
repo_sources: SUSE package metadata lists https://github.com/sigpipe/urlview as the project URL, and the repository contains the upstream source and README.
tags_sources: Official repository README describes extracting URLs from text and menu selection.
